title: rubus × mayerianus
intro: Rubus × mayerianus, also known as the hybrid Raspberry, is a cross between the European Raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the Asian Raspberry (Rubus fruticosus). It is a deciduous shrub that is widely cultivated for its edible fruits, which are rich in vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants. The medicinal properties of Rubus × mayerianus include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and boost the immune system. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × mayerianus include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving cognitive function, and supporting healthy digestion, and it can be prepared as a tea, jam, or supplement, and is often used in herbal remedies.
